mapper.sql:
select sa.alert_status_enum_alert_status_enum_id_1 , ate.type_name , sa.create_time , ase.status_name , sa.description , ui.role_enum_role_enum_id_1 , sa.security_alert_id , sa.report_user_info_user_info_id_1 , sa.alert_level_enum_alert_level_enum_id_1 , ui.password , ale.level_name , sa.alert_type_enum_alert_type_enum_id_1 , ui.phone_number , sa.process_progress , ui.username
FROM security_alert sa left join alert_type_enum ate on sa.alert_type_enum_alert_type_enum_id_1 = ate.alert_type_enum_id left join alert_level_enum ale on sa.alert_level_enum_alert_level_enum_id_1 = ale.alert_level_enum_id left join alert_status_enum ase on sa.alert_status_enum_alert_status_enum_id_1 = ase.alert_status_enum_id left join user_info ui on sa.report_user_info_user_info_id_1 = ui.user_info_id
mapper.select:
select sa.alert_status_enum_alert_status_enum_id_1 , ate.type_name , sa.create_time , ase.status_name , sa.description , ui.role_enum_role_enum_id_1 , sa.security_alert_id , sa.report_user_info_user_info_id_1 , sa.alert_level_enum_alert_level_enum_id_1 , ui.password , ale.level_name , sa.alert_type_enum_alert_type_enum_id_1 , ui.phone_number , sa.process_progress , ui.username
FROM security_alert sa left join
alert_type_enum
ate on sa.alert_type_enum_alert_type_enum_id_1 = ate.alert_type_enum_id left join
alert_level_enum
ale on sa.alert_level_enum_alert_level_enum_id_1 = ale.alert_level_enum_id left join
alert_status_enum
ase on sa.alert_status_enum_alert_status_enum_id_1 = ase.alert_status_enum_id left join
user_info
ui on sa.report_user_info_user_info_id_1 = ui.user_info_id
${ew.customSqlSegment}
